appliedUpdates.description: Added federation env vars (FEDERATION_INSTANCE_NAME, FEDERATION_TIMEOUT_MS, FEDERATION_STALE_MS, FEDERATION_MAX_RETRIES) to environment.md
Added federation architecture section to architecture.md documenting 8 API endpoints, privacy model, and design choices
Added browser embedding trigram fallback documentation to architecture.md (hash space, method, limitations, fallback chain)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'pi-conn-' to the documented CSS prefix convention list: 'BEM-like prefix convention per component area (lane-, pers-, ct-, af-, fh-, pi-conn-)'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature browser-onnx-embedding and pi-lane-full added 162+ lines of CSS with pi-conn-* prefix. The prefix follows the established pattern but is not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce the existing 'Extract common utilities (formatRelativeTime, lane-tag mappings) to src/ui/utils/' convention. Consider creating a misc-cleanup task to extract the 3 duplicated formatRelativeTime implementations and the text utility duplication in radar-core (tokenize, STOP_WORDS, cosineSimilarity in both cluster.ts and connections.ts).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: formatRelativeTime duplicated in EtaThreadCard.tsx:19, MuThreadCard.tsx:98, PiLaneConnections.tsx:112. STOP_WORDS/tokenize/cosineSimilarity duplicated in radar-core/src/cluster.ts and radar-core/src/connections.ts. AGENTS.md already states the convention but 3 features in dashboard-mvp and connection-engine milestones have not followed it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill: Strengthen TDD enforcement. Two features (connection-engine, federation-enso) wrote implementation before tests but reported followedProcedure: true. Consider adding explicit checkpoint: 'Confirm test file exists and at least one test fails before writing implementation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: connection-engine transcript: Create connections.ts → Create connections.test.ts (tests all pass first run). federation-enso transcript: Create federation.ts → Create federation.test.ts (tests all pass first run). Both handoffs report followedProcedure: true with 0 deviations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill: Add note about integration verification requirements. Federation-enso worker added 8 API endpoints but never started the service or tested with curl. Skill step 6 requires integration verification for API endpoints.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: federation-enso handoff verification has 3 entries (vitest, tsc, combined vitest) but no curl commands or service start. Backend-worker SKILL.md step 6 says 'If the feature involves API endpoints or MCP tools: Start the service... Test with curl.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Frontend-worker skill: Add guidance for when Postgres is unavailable. Workers testing dashboard features may find the MCP backend won't start without Postgres, blocking visual verification with real data. Suggest fallback: use mock data in tests, verify layout/rendering with agent-browser even without live API.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pi-lane-full worker noted: 'The frontend-worker skill could mention that Postgres may not be running in the dev environment, suggesting fallback verification approaches when the full backend stack isn't available.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that /api/federation/receive is intentionally unauthenticated (for inter-peer communication). Future workers should not add requireAdminKey to this endpoint. Consider documenting a roadmap for peer authentication (envelope signatures).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: federation-enso review: main.ts:509 — app.post('/api/federation/receive', ...) is the only POST endpoint without auth. This is by design for peer communication but undocumented.

rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — architecture.md notes 'threat-radar-web vitest: Uses vitest 1.6.x (not workspace 0.34.6)'. The pattern is consistent and intentional.
